summary: Tested Pre-Sales Collaborators feature - all backend API tests pass (11/11), frontend UI tests pass. Collaborator assignment inside Pre-Sales leads works correctly including add/remove collaborators, searchable user picker, role selection, and All Team Members filter.
passed_tests: Missing user_id in add request returns 400 error
Pre-Sales detail page shows Collaborators section in right panel
Add button opens Add Collaborator modal
Searchable dropdown shows users with roles
Collaboration Role dropdown shows role options
Adding collaborator shows success toast and updates count
Activity log shows collaborator add/remove events
All Team Members filter on Pre-Sales list shows users
Filter by team member works correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Backend endpoints correctly implemented at lines 15115-15285 in server.py
Frontend PreSalesDetail.jsx has proper Collaborators section with SearchableSelect component
Permission checks work correctly - owners and users with presales.update can add/remove collaborators
System comments are added to activity log when collaborators are added/removed
seed_data_creation: Used existing presales lead lead_2ae66bb8 for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-Sales Collaborators feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET/POST/DELETE /api/presales/{id}/collaborators. Frontend has Collaborators section in PreSalesDetail.jsx right panel with Add button (data-testid='add-collaborator-btn'). All Team Members filter on PreSales.jsx list page includes collaborator data for filtering.

backend_api.GET /api/presales/{id}/collaborators: WORKING - Returns enriched collaborator list with user details
backend_api.POST /api/presales/{id}/collaborators: WORKING - Adds collaborator with role and reason, creates system comment
backend_api.DELETE /api/presales/{id}/collaborators/: WORKING - Removes collaborator, creates system comment

frontend_ui.collaborators_section: WORKING - Shows in right panel with count and avatars
frontend_ui.add_collaborator_modal: WORKING - Opens with SearchableSelect for users, role dropdown, reason textarea
frontend_ui.remove_collaborator: WORKING - Hover shows X button to remove
frontend_ui.all_team_members_filter: WORKING - Shows searchable list of team members for filtering
